3332150.name: Ail
3332150.description:
The game immerses you in the story of a boy who finds himself in a dark disease-ridden world. The story takes place in northern lands occupied by a southern empire. As a result, the in-game culture blends Viking and Ancient Roman elements. The main character possesses telekinetic powers, allowing you to interact with the world in various ways. Distract enemies, send them down on the wrong track, frighten them, or play pranks on them. Combine these abilities to find your unique playstyle.

Telekinesis

Telekinesis is a key game feature. Almost everything around is interactive: sticks, jars, food, fences, armor, stones — all these can be lifted or thrown. Many of the items have unique properties that help solve puzzles or deal with opponents. Boxes help reach high places, fermented fish causes coughing due to its strong smell, and spider milk makes everything incredibly sticky — these are just a few of the interactive items you can use. How will you use them? The choice is yours.

Puzzles

The game often presents challenges that require some thought before progressing. The most difficult ones are in places holding the most valuable treasures.

Multiple Paths

Each level can be completed in various ways. Every challenge can be solved in numerous ways. Skills and the variety of interactive items allow you to find your most exciting way of completing the game.

Avoidance

Sometimes a fight may be too dangerous. In such situations, you can look for a way to bypass enemies, keeping your distance.

Stealth

Do enemies stand directly in the most convenient path? No problem. Passing by enemies unseen is the true mark of skill.

Battles

Are there few enemies, or do you feel you have a strong tactical position? You can try unleashing all your power on them! Just remember, any misstep could be fatal.

Exploration

Game locations are spacious and contain many hidden corners. By exploring the world around you, you can encounter interesting characters, unlock new ways to progress, develop new abilities for the main character, and learn more about the story. Of course, not everything will be on the surface, and you'll often need to think hard to reach the desired reward.

World

The main character lives in a northern kingdom, which was once occupied by a powerful southern empire. As a result, pagan northern traditions merged with imperial culture, creating a unique atmosphere, new folklore, and fascinating customs. Under these conditions, the protagonist and his sister face a terrible disease — the plague, which cares not for gods; it brings only death and decay. Our heroes have to find a way to survive.

Story

After a tragic barbarian attack on his home village, everything falls apart. His father falls ill, and the path to seek help in the city seems insurmountably dangerous. However, Alex, tormented by resentment and guilt, must walk it. The barbarians may attack again at any time. And they will not wait.
3332150.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
